Definitions for STM32F2/F4 IRQ handlers, firmware loader for flash and CRC, and STM32F4 linker script.


## Files
- **[irq_stm32f2_f4.def](irq_stm32f2_f4.def.md)**: Definitions for STM32F2 and STM32F4 interrupt request (IRQ) handlers with conditional compilation.
- **[main.c](main.c.md)**: Firmware loader implementation for handling flash memory operations and CRC checks.
- **[stm32f4_loader.ld](stm32f4_loader.ld.md)**: Linker script for STM32F4 microcontroller defining memory layout, sections, and stack size.
